name: FutureCrest Acquisition Corp.
summary: . Introduction We are a blank check company incorporated as an exempted company under the laws of the Cayman Islands on June 9, 2025, which will seek to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities.
